calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-25-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
Robert Rothman, Esq. for Plaintiff: DERCO, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Craig Garman, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Joel Maske.
Exhibit 1- Receipt #A37141----------------------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant.
Counsel to prepare and submit a Proposed Judgment, with calculation of Interest and Costs, and stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.
Matter is taken under submission, pending written order.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2007 Set For Trial On Sep-24-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
